G

GameController - Class in Controller
Controller class for the Sudoku game view.
GameController() - Constructor for class Controller.GameController
 
generateSudoku(node) - Method in class Model.dataOfTree
Generates a valid Sudoku solution using recursive backtracking.
generateSudoku(node) - Method in interface Model.IdataOfTree
 
generateVisibleNumbers() - Method in class Model.dataOfTree
Selects the numbers that will be visible to the player.
generateVisibleNumbers() - Method in interface Model.IdataOfTree
 
getChildren() - Method in interface Model.Inode
 
getChildren() - Method in class Model.node
Returns the list of child nodes.
getColumn() - Method in interface Model.Inode
 
getColumn() - Method in class Model.node
Returns the column position of this node.
getData() - Method in interface Model.Inode
 
getData() - Method in class Model.node
Returns the solution value stored in the node.
getIsItVisible() - Method in interface Model.Inode
 
getIsItVisible() - Method in class Model.node
Indicates whether the value of this node is visible to the player.
getMyTree() - Method in class Model.dataOfTree
Returns the Sudoku tree managed by this class.
getMyTree() - Method in interface Model.IdataOfTree
 
getRoot() - Method in class Model.tree
Returns the root node of the tree.
getRow() - Method in interface Model.Inode
 
getRow() - Method in class Model.node
Returns the row position of this node.
getUserValue() - Method in interface Model.Inode
 
getUserValue() - Method in class Model.node
Returns the value entered by the user for this node.
